name: Jubilant Flame International, Ltd
summary: Business Jubilant Flame International, LTD was organized in the state of Nevada on September 29, 2009 under the name Liberty Vision, Inc. The Company provided web development and marketing services for clients through a wholly owned subsidiary until December 5, 2012, when the Company disposed of its subsidiary to a shareholder for a nominal sum. On December 16, 2012, the Company changed its name to Jiu Feng Investment Hong Kong, LTD. On August 18, 2015, the Company changed its name to Jubilant F...
